docker/build.sh.general_idea: Update setenv.sh sourcing to pass an additional domain argument required by the new environment setup.
Add image name and tag to the build output logs for better visibility.
Add a summary block at the end of the script to confirm successful build with details.
docker/build.sh.after:
printf "Image has been built successfully. Details:
"
printf "   - script home: %s
" "$SCRIPT_PATH"
printf "   - source code: %s
" "$IMAGE_SRC"
printf "   - build type:  %s
" "$BUILD_TYPE"
printf "   - base image:  %s
" "$IMAGE_FROM"
printf "   - image image: %s

" "$IMAGE_NAME:$IMAGE_TAG"

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Rename the PKI service from 'ca' to 'pki' and update its image tag to reflect the new naming convention.
Parameterize the PKI service hostname and environment variables using DOMAIN_NAME and other env vars instead of hardcoded values.
docker/docker-compose.yml.before:
container_name: ca.hello.com
hostname: ca.hello.com
environment:
    - EASYRSA_REQ_CN=hello.com

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the Directory Server (ds) image tag and rename it to use the remal prefix.
Parameterize the Directory Server hostname and environment variables, and add dependency on the pki service.
docker/docker-compose.yml.before:
container_name: ds.hello.com
hostname: ds.hello.com
environment:
    - CA_HOST=ca.hello.com

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add a new Access Management (forgerock-am) service configured with Java 21 compatible images and dependencies.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
forgerock-am:
    image: remal-am-7.3:0.0.1
    container_name: am.${DOMAIN_NAME}
    depends_on:
        - pki

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add a new Hashicorp Vault service configured with Java 21 compatible images and dependencies.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
vault:
    image: remal-vault-1.14:0.0.1
    container_name: vault.${DOMAIN_NAME}
    depends_on:
        - pki

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add a new Hashicorp Consul service configured with Java 21 compatible images and dependencies.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
consul:
    image: remal-consul-1.18:1.0.0
    container_name: consul.hello.com
    depends_on:
        - pki

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add a new hello-service-1 container using the Java 21 runner image.
Add a new user-service-1 container using the Java 21 runner image.
Add a new user-service-2 container using the Java 21 runner image.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific code is introduced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the project.build.sourceEncoding property as it is no longer explicitly required or managed in this configuration.
Add module definitions for template-commons, hello-service, and user-service to the parent POM.
